title: Crumbly Smoky Venezuelan Pinto Beans
description: This energizing dish features crumbly smoked pinto beans seasoned with smoky flavors and low-sodium spices to make a delicious accompaniment for your meals.

ingredients.name: salt-free smoked paprika
ingredients.notes: smoked paprika with no added salt

ingredients.name: smoked chipotle peppers in adobo
ingredients.notes: remove seeds for milder flavor, or keep whole and crush lightly before adding

instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine pinto beans, smoked paprika, and adobo-pepper.
Add soy sauce and lime juice. Stir until well combined, ensuring all beans are evenly coated with the mixture.
Transfer the bean mixture to an oven-safe baking dish and distribute it evenly.
Bake for 15 minutes or until golden brown and slightly crispy.
Remove from oven and allow to cool before serving.
